testcase.name: testAddProductModalOpens

failure.message: Product name field must be in modal expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Product name field must be in modal expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at error.message:
